channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: a reminder that Anthropic is a > fear-mongering company thatʼs > lobbying against opensource AI > to...
item.description: a reminder that Anthropic is a > fear-mongering company thatʼs > lobbying against opensource AI > to stop you from running > your own AI models theyʼre > pro-regulation with an agenda > pushing “safety” as control > wants to gatekeep, not protect > malicious DO NOT TRUST THEM

item.title: @elonmusk: In Elon Musk’s 2018 leaked Tesla memo, he lays out 7 blunt rules for getting more shit done:
item.description: In Elon Musk’s 2018 leaked Tesla memo, he lays out 7 blunt rules for getting more shit done:

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon, Kimbal and Tosca Musk in 1991

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon nailed the real test for Mars: the fork in human destiny is whether we build a city there that ...
item.description: Elon nailed the real test for Mars: the fork in human destiny is whether we build a city there that can keep going and growing even if Earth stops sending resupply ships. If Mars can survive on its own, consciousness gets a way longer shot at lasting.

item.title: @elonmusk: Did you know that Anthropic paid 1.5 billion dollars, the biggest copyright settlement in history fo...
item.description: Did you know that Anthropic paid 1.5 billion dollars, the biggest copyright settlement in history for stealing millions of authors books from pirate sites to train Claude? MISANTHROPIC

item.title: @elonmusk: This is Sarah Wilson - Rotherham grooming survivor who just helped jail her seventh abuser (Riyasth ...
item.description: This is Sarah Wilson - Rotherham grooming survivor who just helped jail her seventh abuser (Riyasth Hussain - 28 years).@Sarahw9111She looked him in the eye and said: “You took my childhood. I’m taking your freedom. I am your karma.” Her voice cracks with rage as she slams Rotherham Council & police for ignoring her cries as a child. 177 contacts at 14. They did NOTHING. They chose "community relations" over stopping rapists. Her fury is EVERY victim's fury. The establishment failed these girls - still failing them. Where’s the justice?

item.title: @elonmusk: This NYPD officer arrested illegal immigrant Jose Ibarra for child endangerment. New York Democrats ...
item.description: This NYPD officer arrested illegal immigrant Jose Ibarra for child endangerment. New York Democrats refused to turn him over to ICE and released him. He never showed up for court. The Biden administration then paid for him & his illegal immigrant friends to fly to Georgia as part of a taxpayer-funded internal movement program disclosed at his trial. In Georgia, he murdered Laken Riley when she fought his rape attempts. The Democrats let Riley's murderer into the country, released him back onto the streets after his first arrest despite an ICE request to pick him up, helped him evade his court date and finally flew him to his victim at taxpayer expense to commit his crime. Democrat policies killed Laken Riley. Please don't ever give them power again.

item.title: @elonmusk: Nothing will prepare you for the testimony of a British girl who was mass-raped by "Pakistani-herita...
item.description: Nothing will prepare you for the testimony of a British girl who was mass-raped by "Pakistani-heritage men," including copsnotthebee.com/article/britis…

item.title: @elonmusk: Something's got to give. "His own daughter was raped. And he told her crying that he is not allowed ...
item.description: Something's got to give. "His own daughter was raped. And he told her crying that he is not allowed to even DISCUSS this with anyone or he will be arrested and sent to prison. He can't talk about his daughter's rape. He can do nothing."

item.title: @elonmusk: Restore Britain is the last and only hope
item.description: Restore Britain is the last and only hope

item.title: @elonmusk: Nobody ever fled capitalism for socialism. The boats always go one direction.
item.description: Nobody ever fled capitalism for socialism. The boats always go one direction.

item.title: @elonmusk: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering hum...
item.description: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering humanity Discovering all physics Inventing all useful technologies Consciousness to the stars Love
